tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The factory's assembly line runs fast. Cricket is the most popular sport in India. The football team won the match. Hockey is our national game. I like playing badminton.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He got first place in the race. The players are running on the field. The team performed well. The match is tomorrow evening. The ball went out of the boundary.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "उसने गोल करके जीत दिलाई।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He scored a goal and won the match.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "Hockey are our national game."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: His voice is very soft. There is a lot of noise in the factory. There was complete silence at night. An echo was heard in the mountains.
